reviews.review_description:
Although in its infant stages, mostly everything about this game is fantastic: the setting, the timed missions, collecting ammunition and other gear, the general theme and objective.

The only thing hiding it back is the current driving control scheme. To say it's sloppy and practically impossible to handle is an understatement. However, this is still clearly a work in progress, so I'm sure the devs will keep working hard to refine it.

Keep up the good work!
But can you add the option to be able to control the car by just using only the motion controller ( Left, Right ) similar to using a gamepad, instead of using your hands to operate it?

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks a ton for the review! Yup, that control option is actually something we’re working on. It’ll be part of an upcoming update real soon. Really appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: You can really feel the love the developers poured into the game. The gameplay is fantastic. I'm really looking forward to future updates, especially the co-op mode, so that I can enjoy it with friends.

reviews.review_title: Definitely keeping an eye on this one!
reviews.review_description: Played a bit and love it so far. Can't wait to see what it looks like when it's ready for a full release!
Lot of potential, brake system should improve but overall experience was really addictive with high adrenaline rush

developer_response.body: Hey, really glad you liked it! we’re always cooking up improvements and updates, stay tuned, more coming your way soon!

reviews.review_description: Gun handling is  soo satisfying, though aiming while steering
